patch.value: GH-592: tracker_not_initialized recovery re-suggests pm init even when a --pm-path tracker exists — following it silently splits workspace state

GitHub issue #592 (GH-501 residue): a workspace initialized with --pm-path <custom> still fails bare commands with tracker_not_initialized, and the recovery bundle re-suggests pm init — creating a second tracker at <cwd>/.agents/pm and silently splitting workspace state. Fix = recovery bundle documents that discovery probes .agents/pm only and names --pm-path/PM_PATH; ideally detects an existing non-default tracker nearby (e.g. <cwd>/.pm or one level down) and suggests the exact --pm-path invocation instead of init. Capability-aware hint-rendering family (pm-qljv class).

tracker_not_initialized recovery names --pm-path/PM_PATH and the .agents/pm-only discovery rule; nearby non-default tracker detection suggests the concrete --pm-path command instead of pm init; no false-positive suggestions from unrelated settings.json files; regression coverage including the GH-501 positional-init fixed path
